claim_boundary: This contract documents foundation setup and validation; HelixDB now includes safe deterministic HDoc encoding, while a validating decoder, owned and borrowed document views, query, storage, durability, GPU execution, network service, compatibility, security, performance, and release functionality remain unimplemented.

playwright.linux_dependencies_command: corepack npm exec -- playwright install-deps chromium firefox webkit

troubleshooting.condition: Node is outside the supported major-line ranges
troubleshooting.action: Select Node 22.23.1 or another version accepted by the declared engine range.

troubleshooting.condition: Corepack is absent or npm is not 11.18.0
troubleshooting.action: Install an official supported Node distribution and invoke the package manager through corepack npm.

troubleshooting.condition: npm ci reports package.json and package-lock.json drift
troubleshooting.action: Do not edit the lock by hand; restore unintended drift or regenerate it in a focused dependency change.

troubleshooting.condition: A package lifecycle script is denied or requested
troubleshooting.action: Keep --ignore-scripts and the strict lifecycle policy; review any required script as a dependency-policy change.

troubleshooting.condition: The pinned Rust toolchain does not activate
troubleshooting.action: Install rustup, enter the repository root, and let rust-toolchain.toml select Rust 1.96.1.

troubleshooting.condition: A required Rust component or target is missing
troubleshooting.action: Run rustup component list --installed and rustup target list --installed from the repository root before repairing the pinned toolchain.

troubleshooting.condition: A frozen or offline Cargo command cannot find a locked registry crate
troubleshooting.action: With network access enabled for this explicit preparation step, run cargo fetch --locked; do not relax --frozen on validation commands.

troubleshooting.condition: The pinned cargo-audit binary, reviewed tool lock, or RustSec database is absent or rejected
troubleshooting.action: Run corepack npm run rust:audit:install, preserve any checksum or self-audit failure, and rerun the live dependency report with network access.

troubleshooting.condition: A native link step cannot find a platform compiler or linker
troubleshooting.action: Install the platform build tools and use a shell where cc, Xcode clang, or MSVC cl.exe is discoverable.

troubleshooting.condition: The pinned component validator rejects the local operating system or architecture
troubleshooting.action: Run component validation on Linux x64 or rely on the declared Linux x64 CI lane; do not bypass validation.

troubleshooting.condition: The validator cache is incomplete or fails an integrity check
troubleshooting.action: Preserve the error, remove only target/toolchain/wasm-tools and its ignored download cache, then rerun the pinned installer.

troubleshooting.condition: Playwright cannot find a pinned browser executable
troubleshooting.action: Run corepack npm run browser:install as the same user that will run the smoke test.

troubleshooting.condition: A Linux browser fails because shared libraries or system packages are absent
troubleshooting.action: Run the documented Playwright install-deps command with the system privilege appropriate to the machine.
Stop the conflicting local listener; the fixed address and strict port are part of the test contract.

troubleshooting.condition: Browser download fails behind a proxy or private certificate authority
troubleshooting.action: Configure HTTPS_PROXY and NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS for the install; do not disable TLS verification.

troubleshooting.condition: Coverage or AddressSanitizer is requested on another host profile
troubleshooting.action: Run the diagnostic on Linux x64 or use its CI lane; absence on another host is not a pass.

troubleshooting.condition: WGSL validation cannot launch pinned Chromium with SwiftShader
troubleshooting.action: Provision the pinned Chromium browser and Linux dependencies, then keep the compile-only result distinct from GPU support.

troubleshooting.condition: A retained report no longer matches its source authority
troubleshooting.action: Regenerate the producing check and then recollect the retained bundle; never edit a report into agreement.

troubleshooting.condition: Bootstrap preflight finds tracked or untracked changes
troubleshooting.action: Inspect and preserve the changes, then run the clean-checkout proof in a separate worktree or clone; never reset unknown work.
